Whenever an artifact you control enters, you may create a Clue token for each of its colors. Do this only once each turn. At the beginning of your upkeep, if the colors of artifacts you control include five different colors, you may transform Navani.

card.name: The Assassin in White
card.text: When ~ enters, target opponent becomes the monarch. When attacking the monarch, ~ gains deathtouch and trample. When ~ would die, instead exile it and return it to the battlefield transformed White to be bold. White to not blend into the night. White to give warning. For if you were going to assassinate a man, he was entitled to see you coming.
